'''Nem Bees''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the pan-[[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. When, late in the war, Bees's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Orto/Legends|Orto]] was threatened by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] dispatched him to undermine the Separatists' efforts and secure Orto for the Republic. Disguised as the deceased Ortolan trader [[Ydde]], Bees searched for a reported influential traitor who planned to sell the Ortolan people out to the Confederates.

Despite his efforts, Orto was invaded successfully by the Confederacy a mere three days after Bees's arrival. [[Belo Tusus]] was revealed as the traitor, and despite the setback, Bees persisted in his mission. Sabotaging the machinations of Tusus's new Orto government, Bees paved the way for a successful Republic counterstrike. During the campaign to eliminate the last pockets of Confederate resistance, [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was initiated by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and as a result, Bees was slain by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Deviss/Legends|Deviss]].

==Biography==
===Investigation on Orto===
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars']] final [[Standard year/Legends|year]], [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Mission to Mustafar]], which ended the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] lost holdings in the [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]]. The only stable [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the general vicinity was [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]], and talk of secession brewed at the Sluis end of the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]]. Realizing the importance of the planet [[Orto/Legends|Orto]] in the crisis, the Republic dispatched [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] Nem Bees to the planet, his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. There, intelligence reports claimed that an official, highly placed in Orto's neutral government, was planning a coup. If it succeeded, it would place Orto in the official's hands, who would then surely align himself with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="db" />

[[File:BeesDroidsOhNoes.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Nem Bees watches as the Confederacy of Independent Systems marches into Orto's capital.]]
At the urging of fellow Knight [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], Bees disguised himself as the trader [[Ydde]],<ref name="db" /> who had actually been murdered well over a decade prior.<ref name="ptr">''[[Star Wars: Prelude to Rebellion]]''</ref> He stayed with Ydde's extended family as he operated in Orto's capital undercover, hunting for the traitor that would betray his planet and his people. Despite Bees's efforts, mere days after his arrival [[Financial Minister]] [[Belo Tusus]] staged his coup. Seizing control of the government while announcing his allegiance to the Confederacy, Tusus locked down all of Orto's [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]]. Shortly afterwards, the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] armies of the Confederacy arrived to occupy the planet. Realizing that his cover would be important if he were to swing events to his favor, Bees maintained his cover, playing the role of a frightened citizen as the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] swept through the city.<ref name="db" />

===Sabotage===
Despite his initial unwilling passiveness towards the unwanted Confederate occupation, Bees acted quickly. Just as Tusus began to install his new government, Bees effectively sabotaged it, militarily and logistically. He struck in several areas, preventing droid detachments from deploying, and severing [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] guidance systems. Bees was fortunate to have a contact in Tusus's government: the traitor's own [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Belo Tusus's servant|servant]]. Tusus, however, never discovered the leak, though he became increasingly paranoid and suspicious of his staff and the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] attachés in his council.<ref name="db" />

Planning one final act of sabotage, Bees gained access to a [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] transceiver, thanks to his Twi'lek ally. Contacting the Republic for the first time since the annexation of Orto, he arranged to have a strike force sent to Orto at a specific time. Working fast, Bees infiltrated the capital's palace, and disabled Orto's [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] just as the Republic strike force emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="db" />

===Demise at the Battle of Orto===
Tusus, in a panic, abandoned his holdings and fled Orto. Bees rendezvoused with his allies as they landed. Led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Deviss/Legends|Deviss]], the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] met with Bees and progressed towards Orto's capital in the hopes of liberating it from the Confederacy. The [[Battle of Orto]], however, was not resolved quickly, as the droid armies had firmly entrenched themselves. A week into the campaign, [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was issued. Though he did not know it, Bees was now considered an enemy of the Republic, and his death was now the number one priority of his own troops. Acting on his orders, Commander Deviss gunned down Bees as the diminutive [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] led an assault on the Confederate position.<ref name="db" />

==Personality and traits==
The [[Gender/Legends|male]] Ortolan Nem Bees had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[eye]]s and stood at one and a half [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. During the trying times of the Clone Wars, Bees was thrust amongst his own people on his home planet, and had to live like a commoner in order to fulfill his duty to the Republic he served. When Belo Tusus betrayed Orto to the Confederacy, Bees was forced to act dispassionately, and sit idly by while troops marched into the planet's capital. That choice would later allow Bees to free his people in a more bloodless fashion.<ref name="db" />

==Powers and abilities==
Nem Bees was adept in the fields of subterfuge and infiltration, which he proved during the Orto situation in 19 BBY. He was able to inhabit the persona of Ydde, and maintain his cover for the duration of his mission. Bees was able to identify and exploit the chinks in his adversary Belo Tusus's armor, and effectively undermine the former Financial Minister's new Orto government. Working in tandem with his mole in Tusus's government, Bees damaged many auxiliary operations of the government, and aided his people in doing so. In a matter of mere hours, Bees was able to go from the role of saboteur to [[General/Legends|general]], as he commanded his troops in the Battle of Orto. Despite his talents, he was unable to defend himself from the unexpected attack of his [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone commander]].<ref name="db" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Boxy.png|thumb|right|150px|StarWars.com Databank preview identifying Nem Bees]]
The character of Nem Bees appeared in the episode "[[Chapter 22 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 22]]" of the second season of [[Genndy Tartakovsky]]'s television series ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''. At that point, the character was an unnamed Ortolan featured briefly in two shots of a montage.<ref name="sw:cw" /> In [[2006]], a name and a backstory was given to the character by [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] member [[Kyle Jewhurst]], under the screen name "Lord Hydronium," through the "[[What's The Story?]]" feature on [[StarWars.com]].<ref name="db" /> The character was retroactively made a Jedi Knight by Jewhurst, who had noted that no members of the Ortolan species had been a Jedi previously in [[canon]]. Jewhurst also made reference to Bees's [[Jedi Master/Legends|master]] being [[Shon Kon Ray]], but the reference was cut during the editorial process.<ref name="blog">{{Blog|lordhydronium|1|Tales of a Jedi: The Creation of Nem Bees}}</ref>

Which particular Ortolan Bees is in the wide shot displayed in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry is not clear;<ref name="db" /> however, the small preview boxes featured on StarWars.com identify Bees as the Ortolan to the far left of the image.<ref name="Small">{{SWArchive|url=databank/updates/news20060203.html|text=What's the Story, Round 4}}</ref> The image was later used in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', in which Bees was given an entry.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|66|Bees, Nem}}</ref>
